'''hapawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:obduration|obduration]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obduration|obduration]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hapawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæpæwæth|hæpæwæth]] || [[word:hæpæwæj|hæpæwæj]] || [[word:hæpæwæsh|hæpæwæsh]] || [[word:hæpæwæ|hæpæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hapapawath|hapapawath]] || [[word:hapapawaj|hapapawaj]] || [[word:hapapawash|hapapawash]] || [[word:hapapawa|hapapawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hapawath|hapawath]] || [[word:hapawaj|hapawaj]] || [[word:hapawash|hapawash]] || [[word:hapawa|hapawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hapafwafth|hapafwafth]] || [[word:hapafwafj|hapafwafj]] || [[word:hapafwafsh|hapafwafsh]] || [[word:hapafwaf|hapafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hapawatha|hapawatha]] || [[word:hapawaja|hapawaja]] || [[word:hapawasha|hapawasha]] || [[word:hapawaka|hapawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hapawath|hapawath]] || [[word:hapawaj|hapawaj]] || [[word:hapawash|hapawash]] || [[word:hapawa|hapawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hapawathal|hapawathal]] || [[word:hapawajal|hapawajal]] || [[word:hapawashal|hapawashal]] || [[word:hapawakal|hapawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hapawaathatha|hapawaathatha]] || [[word:hapawaajaja|hapawaajaja]] || [[word:hapawaashasha|hapawaashasha]] || [[word:hapawaaka|hapawaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hapawathan|hapawathan]] || [[word:hapawajan|hapawajan]] || [[word:hapawashan|hapawashan]] || [[word:hapawakan|hapawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hapawathaoro|hapawathaoro]] || [[word:hapawajaoro|hapawajaoro]] || [[word:hapawashaoro|hapawashaoro]] || [[word:hapawakaoro|hapawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
